lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਸਭੁ ਜੀਅ ਕੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਭਾਈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾ ਸੈਂਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eihu kuttanb sabh jeea ke bandhan bhaaee bharam bhulaa sainsaaraa |
lines.english: All of these relatives are like chains upon the soul, O Siblings of Destiny; the world is deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਦੁਖ ਕਾਟੇ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilabikh dukh kaatte aape mel milaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: The sins and sorrows of countless lifetimes are eradicated; the Lord Himself unites them in His Union. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਕਰਹਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: karam kareh gurasabad na pachhaaneh mar janameh vaaro vaaraa |2|
lines.english: One who performs rituals without realizing the Word of the Guru's Shabad, shall die and be reborn, again and again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਬੰਧਨ ਟੂਟਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur bandhan ttootteh naahee guramukh mokh duaaraa |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the chains cannot be broken; the Gurmukhs find the door of salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਮੇਰਾ ਜਗੁ ਪਲਚਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਕੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: hau meraa jag palach rahiaa bhaaee koe na kis hee keraa |
lines.english: The world is entangled in egotism and possessiveness, O Siblings of Destiny, but no one belongs to anyone else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਨਿ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਸੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh mehal paaein gun gaavan nij ghar hoe baseraa |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs attain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, singing the Glories of the Lord; they dwell in the home of their own inner being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੁ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੇਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aithai boojhai su aap pachhaanai har prabh hai tis keraa |3|
lines.english: One who understands here, realizes himself; the Lord God belongs to him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਸਦਾ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਕਿਆ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satiguroo sadaa deaal hai bhaaee vin bhaagaa kiaa paaeeai |
lines.english: The True Guru is forever merciful, O Siblings of Destiny; without good destiny, what can anyone obtain?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਜੇਹਾ ਭਾਉ ਤੇਹਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: ek nadar kar vekhai sabh aoopar jehaa bhaau tehaa fal paaeeai |
lines.english: He looks alike upon all with His Glance of Grace, but people receive the fruits of their rewards according to their love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਈਐ ॥੪॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai man antar vichahu aap gavaaeeai |4|6|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to dwell within the mind, then self-conceit is eradicated from within. ||4||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਚੌਤੁਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 chauatuke |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl, Chau-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਚੀ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sachee bhagat satigur te hovai sachee hiradai baanee |
lines.english: True devotional worship is obtained only through the True Guru, when the True Word of His Bani is in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਾਚੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਹੋਰ ਭੂਲੀ ਫਿਰੈ ਇਆਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur saache bhagat na hovee hor bhoolee firai eaanee |
lines.english: Without the Guru, there is no true devotion; otherwise, people wander around, deluded by ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve sadaa sukh paae haumai sabad samaanee |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, eternal peace is obtained; egotism is obliterated through the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਰਹਹੁ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re sadaa rahahu saranaaee |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, remain forever in the Lord's Sanctuary, under His Protection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਡੂਬਿ ਮੁਏ ਵਿਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: manamukh fireh sadaa dukh paaveh ddoob mue vin paanee |1|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs wander around, suffering in constant pain; they drown and die, even without water. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਪਤਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aapanee nadar kare pat raakhai har naamo de vaddiaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: Bestowing His Glance of Grace, He preserves our honor, and blesses us with the glory of the Lord's Name. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚੈ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur te aap pachhaataa sabad sachai veechaaraa |
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, one comes to understand himself, contemplating the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਭ ਠਾਈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa hajoor raviaa sabh tthaaee hiradai naam apaaraa |
lines.english: The Lord is ever-present, permeating and pervading all places; the Name of the Infinite Lord is enshrined within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਸਦ ਵਸਿਆ ਤਜਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai jagajeevan sad vasiaa taj kaam krodh ahankaaraa |
lines.english: The Lord, the Life of the world, ever abides in his heart, and he renounces sexual desire, anger and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੀ ਨਾਉ ਮੀਠਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jug jug baanee sabad pachhaanee naau meetthaa maneh piaaraa |2|
lines.english: Throughout the ages, through the Word of His Bani, His Shabad is realized, and the Name becomes so sweet and beloved to the mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਸਫਲ ਜਨਮੁ ਜਗਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev jin naam pachhaataa safal janam jag aaeaa |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, one realizes the Naam, the Name of the Lord; fruitful is his life, and his coming into the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਗੁਣੀ ਅਘਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har ras chaakh sadaa man tripatiaa gun gaavai gunee aghaaeaa |
lines.english: Tasting the sublime elixir of the Lord, his mind is satisfied and satiated forever; singing the Glories of the Glorious Lord, he is fulfilled and satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਿ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kamal pragaas sadaa rang raataa anahad sabad vajaaeaa |
lines.english: The lotus of his heart blossoms forth, he is ever imbued with the Lord's Love, and the unstruck melody of the Shabad resounds within him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tan man niramal niramal baanee sache sach samaaeaa |3|
lines.english: His body and mind become immaculately pure; his speech becomes immaculate as well, and he merges in the Truest of the True. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਮਗੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su mag pachhaanai har ras rasan rasaaee |
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh, understands the Path; his tongue savors the sublime essence of the Lord's Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam kee gat koe na boojhai guramat ridai samaaee |
lines.english: No one knows the state of the Lord's Name; through the Guru's Teachings, it comes to abide in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਭੁ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam sabh gur te hovai hiradai naam vasaaee |
lines.english: Meditation, austere self-discipline and self-restraint are all obtained from the Guru; the Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to abide within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਹਿ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸੋਹਨਿ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੪॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaaleh se jan sohan dar saachai pat paaee |4|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, those humble beings who praise the Naam are beautiful; they are honored in the Court of the True Lord. ||4||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਃ ੩ ਦੁਤੁਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 dutuke |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl, Dho-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਉਲਟੀ ਭਈ ਭਾਈ ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਬੂਝ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai ulattee bhee bhaaee jeevat marai taa boojh paae |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, one turns away from the world, O Siblings of Destiny; when he remains dead while yet alive, he obtains true understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਗੁਰੂ ਸੋ ਸਿਖੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਜਿਸੁ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so guroo so sikh hai bhaaee jis jotee jot milaae |1|
lines.english: He alone is the Guru, and he alone is a Sikh, O Siblings of Destiny, whose light merges in the Light. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਗੈ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਥਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man har jap meetthaa laagai bhaaee guramukh paae har thaae | rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, it seems so sweet to the mind, O Siblings of Destiny; the Gurmukhs obtain a place in the Court of the Lord. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re har har setee liv laae |
lines.english: O my mind, be lovingly attuned to the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.
